body.title: Word graph spreading activation as embedding producer
body.description:
Add text_to_activation_vector(text) to the word graph: spreading activation from input words produces a normalized float vector over word/memory space. Run in parallel with nomic-embed-text (Ollama) at embedding time; compare outputs to generate training signal for the graph. Long-term intent: phase out Ollama as the graph improves.

The word graph is deterministic — same graph state + same input = same activation vector. Two semantically similar texts activate overlapping nodes and produce similar vectors. This is the basis for the reader equivalence test and for all future similarity queries.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/word_graph.py (add text_to_activation_vector), devices/scraps/embedding_engine.py (add graph backend alongside ollama/openai/hash)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; deterministic per graph state; parallel-run with Ollama produces training comparison
**Scope boundary:** produces vectors + comparison signal only; training loop is a follow-on ticket; does not remove Ollama yet
**Test plan:** same input text produces identical vectors on two calls with same graph state; similar texts produce cosine > 0.7; dissimilar texts produce lower cosine; comparison delta logged for training
